response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but lacks the specific JVM/Java/Kotlin/Spring depth required for this enterprise IDE role. Java is listed only as a skill with limited demonstrated use (robotic arms at Altom), and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or IDE/language tooling work. Their strongest expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which do not align with the core requirements.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Experience contributing to a C IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI) shows some exposure to IDE/developer tooling
Proven track record on complex, large-scale systems including high-throughput micro-services
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only minimal Java experience from nearly a decade ago
No Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus ecosystem experience listed
No JVM internals or modern language-tooling work; primary stack is JS/TS and DLang
